sentences.target: Der Prozess zieht sich schon seit Monaten.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ pʁoˈtsɛs tsiːt zɪç ʃoːn zaɪt ˈmoːnatən/

translations.de: Der Prozess zieht sich schon seit Monaten.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ pʁoˈtsɛs tsiːt zɪç ʃoːn zaɪt ˈmoːnatən/
translations.en: The trial has been dragging on for months.
translations.fr: Le procès traîne depuis des mois.
translations.it: Il processo si trascina da mesi.
translations.zh-Hans: 审判已经拖了好几个月了。
translations.pt: O julgamento está se arrastando há meses.
translations.vi: Phiên tòa đã kéo dài suốt nhiều tháng.
translations.nl: De rechtszaak sleept al maanden aan.
translations.uk: Судовий процес тягнеться вже кілька місяців.
translations.hu: A per már hónapok óta húzódik.
translations.hi: मुकदमा महीनों से खिंच रहा है.
translations.pl: Proces sądowy ciągnie się od miesięcy.
translations.el: Η δίκη σέρνεται εδώ και μήνες.
translations.nb: Rettssaken har dratt ut i månedsvis.
translations.sv: Rättegången har dragit ut på tiden i flera månader.
translations.ro: Procesul se prelungește de luni de zile.
translations.cs: Soudní proces se táhne už měsíce.
translations.da: Retssagen har trukket ud i månedsvis.
translations.ja: 裁判は何ヶ月も長引いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine, determines the subject noun.
Masculine noun; nominative singular, head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; with reflexive pronoun forms the pronominal verb meaning ‘to drag on’.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person), accusative; part of the pronominal verb ‘sich ziehen’, not a separate semantic argument here.
Temporal/pragmatic adverb indicating that the situation has been ongoing.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal span.
Plural dative of ‘Monat’; object of the preposition ‘seit’, indicates duration.

sentences.target: Wir erklären dir den Prozess später.

translations.de: Wir erklären dir den Prozess später.
translations.en: We’ll explain the process to you later.
translations.es: Más tarde te explicaremos el proceso.
translations.fr: On t’expliquera la procédure plus tard.
translations.it: Più tardi ti spiegheremo la procedura.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们稍后再向你解释流程。
translations.yue: 我哋之後再同你解釋個流程。
translations.pt: Mais tarde a gente te explica o procedimento.
translations.he: נסביר לך את התהליך אחר כך.
translations.vi: Lát nữa bọn mình sẽ giải thích quy trình cho bạn.
translations.nl: We leggen je de procedure later uit.
translations.hi: हम बाद में तुम्हें प्रक्रिया समझाएँगे.
translations.el: Θα σου εξηγήσουμε τη διαδικασία αργότερα.
translations.id: Nanti kami jelaskan prosesnya ke kamu.
translations.sv: Vi förklarar processen för dig senare.
translations.ro: Îți vom explica procedura mai târziu.
translations.da: Vi forklarer processen for dig senere.
translations.ja: その手順はあとで説明します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; present tense, 1st person plural; transitive verb taking a recipient (dative) and a theme (accusative).
Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular, dative; indirect object/recipient.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine, determines the direct object noun.
Masculine noun; accusative singular, direct object (theme).
Temporal adverb; specifies that the action will occur at a later time.

sentences.target: Der Prozess ist noch nicht abgeschlossen.

translations.de: Der Prozess ist noch nicht abgeschlossen.
translations.es: El proceso aún no ha terminado.
translations.fr: Le processus n’est pas encore terminé.
translations.it: La procedura non è ancora conclusa.
translations.vi: Quy trình vẫn chưa hoàn thành.
translations.nl: Het proces is nog niet afgerond.
translations.hi: प्रक्रिया अभी पूरी नहीं हुई है.
translations.el: Η διαδικασία δεν έχει ολοκληρωθεί ακόμα.
translations.ja: プロセスはまだ終わっていません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine, determines the subject noun.
Masculine noun; nominative singular, head of the subject NP.
Copular verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate complement.
Adverb indicating continuation of the state; often used with ‘nicht’ for ‘not yet’.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate to deny completion.
Predicative adjective (from the past participle of ‘abschließen’); denotes the resultative state ‘completed’.

sentences.target: Im Team besprechen wir den Prozess regelmäßig.
sentences.reading: /ɪm tiːm bəˈʃpʁɛçən viːɐ̯ deːn pʁoˈtsɛs ˈʁeːɡl̩mɛːsɪç/

translations.de: Im Team besprechen wir den Prozess regelmäßig.
translations.ipa: /ɪm tiːm bəˈʃpʁɛçən viːɐ̯ deːn pʁoˈtsɛs ˈʁeːɡl̩mɛːsɪç/
translations.en: We discuss the process regularly in the team.
translations.es: En el equipo hablamos del proceso con regularidad.
translations.fr: En équipe, on discute régulièrement du processus.
translations.it: In squadra discutiamo regolarmente della procedura.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在团队里定期讨论流程。
translations.yue: 我哋喺團隊入面定期討論個流程。
translations.ru: В команде мы регулярно обсуждаем процесс.
translations.pt: Na equipe, a gente discute o processo regularmente.
translations.he: בצוות אנחנו דנים בתהליך באופן קבוע.
translations.vi: Trong nhóm, bọn mình thường xuyên bàn về quy trình.
translations.nl: In het team bespreken we het proces regelmatig.
translations.uk: У команді ми регулярно обговорюємо процес.
translations.hu: A csapatban rendszeresen megbeszéljük a folyamatot.
translations.hi: टीम में हम नियमित रूप से प्रक्रिया पर चर्चा करते हैं.
translations.el: Στην ομάδα συζητάμε τακτικά τη διαδικασία.
translations.nb: I teamet diskuterer vi prosessen jevnlig.
translations.id: Di tim, kami secara rutin membahas prosesnya.
translations.sv: I teamet diskuterar vi processen regelbundet.
translations.ro: În echipă discutăm în mod regulat despre proces.
translations.da: I teamet drøfter vi processen jævnligt.
translations.ja: チームでは定期的にその手順について話し合っています。

tokens.explanation: Prepositional contraction (‘in dem’); governs dative; introduces a locative frame (‘in the team’).
Neuter noun; dative singular as complement of ‘im’.
Finite verb; present tense, 1st person plural; transitive verb taking an accusative object; occurs in V2 position.
Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject placed after the verb due to V2 word order.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine, determines the direct object noun.
Masculine noun; accusative singular, direct object.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the verb phrase indicating habitual repetition.

Der Prozess ist noch nicht abgeschlossen.
Im Team besprechen wir den Prozess regelmäßig.

en: The trial has been dragging on for months.
We’ll explain the process to you later.
We discuss the process regularly in the team.
